name: AirDate.tv — Social RSS → Blotato Auto-Poster - Scenario B

mapper.tq: select * where D = "Ready to Post" AND (E <= now() OR E is null)

notes.content:
Select your YouTube account.

Posts as Community Post for images. For Shorts, upload a vertical video under 60 seconds.

🔴 IMPORTANT: New YouTube accounts are limited to a few API posts per day — this is lifted automatically as you post consistently.

👉 Blotato API Docs

Select your Facebook account.

👉 Blotato API Docs

Select your LinkedIn account.

👉 Blotato API Docs

Select your Instagram account.

Posts as Feed image by default. Change instagramPostType to 'reel' for video content.

👉 Blotato API Docs

Select your TikTok account in the TikTok Account field.

🔴 IMPORTANT: Your TikTok account must be warmed up before using Blotato.

👉 Blotato API Docs

Auto write-back

After posting to all platforms, this module updates the row Status to 'Posted' and stamps the Posted Date column.

No more manual tracking.

Select your Blotato account.

👉 Blotato API Docs

✅ Troubleshoot Errors

📷 Media Requirements

AirDate.tv — Blotato Auto-Poster

Reads rows where Status = 'Ready to Post' from the AirDate Blotato sheet.

Sheet ID: 1Lie6lIfIKfbR_gvgwEqVT9W4vq3jspKQPNT5heCwvWQ

Connect with: airdate.social@gmail.com

Make sure your Google Drive folder is set to PUBLIC (Anyone with link can view).
